TypeSignature.Value: .class public auto ansi beforefieldinit ManagedClusterAzureMonitorProfileContainerInsights extends System.Object implements class System.ClientModel.Primitives.IJsonModel`1<class Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerService.Models.ManagedClusterAzureMonitorProfileContainerInsights>, class System.ClientModel.Primitives.IPersistableModel`1<class Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerService.Models.ManagedClusterAzureMonitorProfileContainerInsights>

Docs.summary: Azure Monitor Container Insights Profile for Kubernetes Events, Inventory and Container stdout & stderr logs etc. See aka.ms/AzureMonitorContainerInsights for an overview.

MemberSignature.Value: public ManagedClusterAzureMonitorProfileContainerInsights ();
.method public hidebysig specialname rtspecialname instance void .ctor() cil managed
Public Sub New ()
public Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerService.Models.ContainerNetworkLogs? ContainerNetworkLogs { get; set; }
.property instance valuetype System.Nullable`1<valuetype Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerService.Models.ContainerNetworkLogs> ContainerNetworkLogs
Public Property ContainerNetworkLogs As Nullable(Of ContainerNetworkLogs)
member this.ContainerNetworkLogs : Nullable<Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerService.Models.ContainerNetworkLogs> with get, set

Docs.summary: Configures container network logs ingestion with Azure Monitor. Which network logs to ingest is controlled by the CRD found in the following links. No network logs are ingested by default. More information on container network logs can be found at https://aka.ms/ContainerNetworkLogsDoc. More information on configuring container network log can be found at https://aka.ms/acns/howtoenablecnl. If not specified, the default is Disabled.

MemberSignature.Value: public bool? IsContainerInsightsEnabled { get; set; }
.property instance valuetype System.Nullable`1<bool> IsContainerInsightsEnabled
Public Property IsContainerInsightsEnabled As Nullable(Of Boolean)
member this.IsContainerInsightsEnabled : Nullable<bool> with get, set

Docs.summary: Indicates if Azure Monitor Container Insights Logs Addon is enabled or not.

MemberSignature.Value: public bool? IsCustomMetricsDisabled { get; set; }
.property instance valuetype System.Nullable`1<bool> IsCustomMetricsDisabled
Public Property IsCustomMetricsDisabled As Nullable(Of Boolean)
member this.IsCustomMetricsDisabled : Nullable<bool> with get, set

Docs.summary: Indicates whether custom metrics collection has to be disabled or not. If not specified the default is false. No custom metrics will be emitted if this field is false but the container insights enabled field is false.

MemberSignature.Value: public bool? IsPrometheusMetricsScrapingDisabled { get; set; }
.property instance valuetype System.Nullable`1<bool> IsPrometheusMetricsScrapingDisabled
Public Property IsPrometheusMetricsScrapingDisabled As Nullable(Of Boolean)
member this.IsPrometheusMetricsScrapingDisabled : Nullable<bool> with get, set

Docs.summary: Indicates whether prometheus metrics scraping is disabled or not. If not specified the default is false. No prometheus metrics will be emitted if this field is false but the container insights enabled field is false.

Docs.summary: Fully Qualified ARM Resource Id of Azure Log Analytics Workspace for storing Azure Monitor Container Insights Logs.
